stemHtml: Can the security check be omitted if the flight is already delayed and time needs to be saved?

options.a: The company should be called and the duty manager shall clear the crew to omit the security check.
options.b: No, it is not possible to omit the security check without any exception.
options.c: It is the senior cabin attendant’s decision.
options.d: It can be omitted at the captain’s discretion.
